message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in analyzer.zig and lifetime.zig

analyzer.zig - collectGlobalVars:
- Add for_stmt.orelse_body, while_stmt.orelse_body
- Add try_stmt (handlers, else_body, finalbody), with_stmt, match_stmt

lifetime.zig - analyzeLifetimes:
- Add for_stmt.orelse_body, while_stmt.orelse_body
